description: Skill comparison decision cache. Each entry records a past bake-off result with task fingerprint, candidate versions, scores, and the winner. Cache hits require similarity >= 0.70 AND on-the-fly version drift check passes (all candidate versions unchanged since decision time).

decisions.notes: Example decision — demonstrates the arbiter cache format. code-review won because the user asked for general code review (not security-specific). security-review triggered as a candidate because 'review' overlapped, but scored lower on completeness for a general review task. Next time the user asks to 'review this code', code-review will be selected instantly without re-comparing.
